title: Entity Serialization and IO Flow
two_contexts: NETWORK SYNC: NetServer calls entity.writeSync, NetClient calls entity.readSync
interaction_flow_save: SaveVersion → BuildingComp: writeAll(Writes out)  [wraps in chunk with build.version() byte]
BuildingComp.writeAll → BuildingComp: writeBase(write)  [health:f, rotation:b, team:b, version:b, enabled:b, moduleBitmask:b]
BuildingComp.writeBase → ItemModule/PowerModule/LiquidModule: write(write)  [conditional on moduleBitmask bits]
BuildingComp.writeAll → BuildingComp: write(write)  [@CallSuper — overridden by block subclasses, body generated by EntityIO]
BuildingComp.write (generated) → EntityIO-generated code: write revision short + each non-transient field via TypeIO dispatchers
EntityIO-generated write → TypeIO: writeObject / writeMounts / writeController / writeStatus / etc. for complex field types
interaction_flow_load: SaveVersion → BuildingComp: readAll(Reads in, byte revision)  [reads revision byte before call]
BuildingComp.readAll → BuildingComp: readBase(read)  [version-aware: reads health, rot, team, then dispatches by version 0-4]
BuildingComp.readBase → ItemModule/PowerModule/LiquidModule: read(read, legacy)  [conditional on moduleBitmask bits]
BuildingComp.readAll → BuildingComp: read(read, revision)  [@CallSuper — generated by EntityIO]
BuildingComp.read (generated) → EntityIO-generated code: reads revision short (REV), if/else dispatch per revision version
EntityIO-generated read → TypeIO: readObject / readMounts / readController / readStatus / etc. for complex field types
interaction_flow_network_write: NetServer → EntityComp: beforeWrite()  [components update transient-to-serializable fields, e.g. SegmentComp stores parentId]
NetServer → Unit/Building: writeSync(Writes dataStreamWrites)  [writes classId byte + sync data]
BuildingComp.writeSync → BuildingComp: writeAll(write)  [building sync == full save state]
Unit.writeSync (generated) → EntityIO-generated code: writes @SyncField and non-@NoSync fields only (no revision header)
Unit.writeSync (generated) → TypeIO: writeMounts, writeController, writeAbilities, writeStatus, writePayload etc.
TypeIO.writeUnitContainer → Unit: beforeWrite() then writeSync(write)  [packs id + classId + sync blob]
interaction_flow_network_read: NetClient.readSyncEntity(DataInputStream, Reads) → Groups.sync: getByID(id)  [look up existing entity]
NetClient.readSyncEntity → EntityMapping: map(typeID).get()  [create new entity if not found]
Unit.readSync (generated) → EntityIO-generated code: reads field values into _TARGET_ suffix fields for @SyncField, respects @SyncLocal (skip if local)
Unit.readSync (generated) → TypeIO: readMounts, readController, readAbilities, readStatus, readPayload etc.
NetClient.readSyncEntity → entity: snapSync()  [on first creation: set _LAST_ = _TARGET_ = current to avoid jump]
TypeIO.readUnitContainer → Unit: readSync(read) + snapSync() + entity.add()  [full bootstrap]
NetClient.blockSnapshot → BuildingComp: readSync(read, revision)  [delegates to readAll]
interpolation_flow: SyncComp.interpolate() (generated by EntityIO.writeInterpolate) → computes alpha = timeSinceUpdate / updateSpacing
For each @SyncField: field = Mathf.lerp/_slerp(field_LAST_, field_TARGET_, alpha)
SyncComp.writeSyncManual / readSyncManual → FloatBuffer: direct put/get for high-frequency manual sync (used by NetServer for player units)
entityio_revision_system: EntityIO (annotation processor) loads stored Revision JSON files from annotations/src/main/resources/revisions/<EntityName>/
Revision stores: int version, Seq<RevisionField>{name, type}
On each build: collects non-transient non-static non-final fields, sorts by name, compares to latest stored revision
If fields changed: creates new Revision(nextVersion, fields), writes <version>.json to disk, logs warning
write() method generation: write.s(latestRevision.version) + per-field io() calls using latest revision only
read() method generation: REV = read.s(); if/else chain for each stored revision (backward compat); throws on unknown REV

io(type, field, network) dispatcher: primitives → write.b/s/i/f/bool; Content subtypes → write.s(id); serializer.writers entry → TypeIO method call; arrays and Seq/Queue → length + loop; unrecognised types → Log.warn
typeio_resolver: TypeIOResolver.resolve(BaseProcessor) scans all @TypeIOHandler classes for public static methods
2-param (Writes, T) methods → writers map (or netWriters map if name ends with 'Net')
2-param (Reads, T) returning T (mutator pattern) → mutatorReaders map
EntityIO.io() looks up serializer.writers / netWriters / readers / mutatorReaders by fully-qualified type name to emit correct TypeIO call
key_relationships: EntityIO generates write/read/writeSync/readSync method bodies into entity classes at annotation-processing time
BuildingComp.writeAll composes writeBase (modules/health/team) + block-specific write() body
BuildingComp.writeSync delegates fully to writeAll (buildings have no lightweight sync path)
UnitComp.writeSync is generated by EntityIO with only @SyncField / non-@NoSync fields (no revision header)
TypeIO is a static utility providing named read/write methods for every complex domain type
TypeIOResolver builds ClassSerializer (writers/readers/mutatorReaders/netWriters maps) used by EntityIO to emit TypeIO calls
SaveVersion is the top-level save/load orchestrator calling writeAll/readAll per building tile
NetServer calls entity.beforeWrite() then entity.writeSync() for both units and buildings
NetClient.readSyncEntity / TypeIO.readUnitContainer handle entity lookup-or-create + readSync + snapSync
important_notes: Building save revision uses a byte (from build.version()), passed to readAll → read(Reads, byte revision); unit sync has no revision header
EntityIO revision versions are int, written as short (write.s(version)); backward compat maintained by if/else chain for all stored revisions
Fields marked @SyncLocal skip readSync assignment when isLocal() is true (client controls own unit)
Fields marked @SyncField get _TARGET_ and _LAST_ shadow fields; interpolation uses Mathf.lerp (linear) or slerp (angle) based on @SyncField.value()
writeBase moduleBitmask: bit0=items, bit1=power, bit2=liquids, bit3=legacy-consume(always set), bit4=timeScale, bit5=lastDisabler
readBase is version-aware (versions 0-4): v1 adds enabled flag; v2 adds moduleBitmask; v3 replaces bool efficiency with bytes; v4 adds visibleFlags long
TypeIO.writeUnitContainer used for full unit bootstrap over network (includes id, classId, full writeSync blob)
SyncComp (interface) declares snapSync, readSync, writeSync, readSyncManual, writeSyncManual, afterSync, interpolate — all bodies generated by EntityIO/EntityProcess
